channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bipartisan U.S.-Mexico congressional caucus launches amid diplomatic tensions
item.description: The launch is supported by the American Mexican Leadership Council, a new national organization debuting Thursday to elevate Mexican American voices.

item.title: Seized ship taken toward Iran as Trump and Xi agree on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A ship was taken by unknown parties toward Iranian waters after an attack on an Indian-flagged vessel off Oman.

item.title: Three credit card debt questions borrowers should consider this week
item.description: Following a series of disappointing inflation reports, credit card users in debt should consider these questions now.

item.title: Border Patrol chief Michael Banks is stepping down
item.description: Michael Banks, the head of U.S. Border Patrol, is stepping down.
